metadata.description: Pegasus related Claude plugins for Claude

plugins.name: pegasus-dev
plugins.description: A Claude plugin for software development on SciTech projects.

plugins.name: impeccable
plugins.description: Design vocabulary and skills for frontend development. Includes 20 commands (/polish, /distill, /audit, /typeset, /overdrive, etc.) and an enhanced frontend-design skill with curated anti-patterns.

plugins.name: nano-banana
plugins.description: Nano Banana image generation. Use when user asks to generate an image, create an image, make an image, or mentions nano banana. Supports Gemini Flash, Pro, and Nano Banana 2 models.

plugins.name: pegasus-ai
plugins.description: A plugin for creating Pegasus WMS workflows with Claude Code.
